title: Finally… A NotebookLM Alternative With an API
summary: Open Notebook is a self-hosted, open-source NotebookLM alternative built for developers who want control over their docs, code, research, and AI workflows. The video tests it against Google NotebookLM and AnythingLLM, covering features like podcast generation from documents and grounded question-answering on uploaded sources.
writeup: This video covers Open Notebook, a self-hosted, open-source NotebookLM alternative aimed at developers who want control over their documents, code, research, and AI workflows, and it exposes an API. The walkthrough tests it against Google NotebookLM and AnythingLLM, focusing on podcast generation from uploaded documents and grounded question-answering against source material. The key point is that self-hosting and an API offer programmatic control and data ownership that the hosted NotebookLM does not, while keeping comparable features like grounding and document-to-podcast generation.
